name: delete_pr_configurations
full_help:
delete_pr_configurations

Description: 
Delete existing configurations

Syntax: 
delete_pr_configurations  [-quiet] [-verbose] <configs>

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <configs>   List of Configurations to delete

Categories: 
Partition

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
